summary: Executed backend pytest regression and mobile-first Expo web UI checks for Heal/Voice/playback/task creation flows. All targeted acceptance flows passed.

issues: Some tappable controls are below recommended 44x44 touch target size (e.g., frequency play button is 42x42).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: useNativeDriver falls back to JS because native animated module is unavailable on web preview.
Console warning: props.pointerEvents deprecated; should migrate to style.pointerEvents.

action_items: Optionally increase small touch targets to at least 44x44 for better mobile ergonomics.
Optionally clean up web runtime warnings (pointerEvents + useNativeDriver fallback) to reduce console noise.
critical_code_review_comments: File size concern: /app/backend/server.py is very large (>700 lines); should be split into focused modules (routes/services/models).
File size concern: /app/frontend/src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx is very large (>700 lines); should be split into smaller components/hooks.
seed_data_creation: Created tasks via POST /api/chat reminder prompts during regression tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Primary requested flows are currently green. Reuse backend test file for reminder/audio regression and verify on physical device for real audio output behavior.
test_credentials: File /app/memory/test_credentials.md exists but is empty. No auth flows were tested in this cycle.
rca_of_issue: No blocking defects found. Minor UI/design and console-warning observations only.
